cards.hook: State of Decay 3 is real — and it's coming 2027
cards.caption: State of Decay 3 got its gameplay reveal at Xbox Games Showcase 2026. Build, scavenge, survive the horde — PS5, Steam, Xbox in 2027. Reveal my feed caught before the timeline did.

cards.hook: Microsoft just laid off 4,800 people in one day
cards.caption: Double Fine, Compulsion — gone in a single round of Microsoft layoffs. "AAA gaming is killing the industry" isn't a hot take anymore, it's the news. The signal my feed surfaces before it trends.
cards.stance: AAA studios keep shipping bigger budgets and thinner margins — the layoffs are the business model, not the accident.

cards.hook: PlayStation stops making game discs in January 2028
cards.caption: Sony is killing physical PS5 discs by 2028 — and gamers are not taking it well. If you own games, you're about to only license them. Caught this one before the timeline melted down.
cards.stance: No discs means no ownership — your library becomes a subscription Sony can revoke.

cards.hook: Xbox studios are next on the chopping block
cards.caption: Every leak points to Xbox studio cuts next week, while PlayStation scrambles for cover. Gaming's never been better in your hands and a shambles behind the scenes. The take my feed kept.
cards.stance: The best era to be a player is the worst era to make games — that gap is the whole story.

cards.hook: You're not nostalgic — the new games are just worse
cards.caption: Everyone "playing older games" isn't nostalgia — it's a verdict on the modern industry, not the old classics. Sharp take my feed pulled out of the noise before it blew up.
cards.stance: Retro revival is a review of 2026, not a love letter to 2010.

cards.hook: A first-person liminal horror game from Studio Noori
cards.caption: Farsight got its reveal trailer at the Horror Game Awards 2026 — first-person liminal horror from Studio Noori. If backrooms dread is your thing, this one's for you. Found before the timeline.

cards.hook: Consoles feel like they're dying — indie is thriving
cards.caption: The console industry looks like it's collapsing, but older titles and indie are THRIVING. Not doomer, just where the life moved. The nuanced take my feed keeps when the timeline only screams.
cards.stance: Gaming isn't dying — the AAA console model is, and indie is eating what's left.

cards.hook: Xbox cut 3,200 jobs and 4 studios — Arkane may be next
cards.caption: Compulsion, Double Fine, Ninja Theory, Undead Labs — all out. Xbox laid off 3,200 and Arkane's future looks grim. If you loved Dishonored, read this. Caught before the timeline noticed.
cards.stance: Microsoft bought these studios to kill competitors, not to ship their games.
